content.en:
After the Eternal Realm lords left, one by one the half-step Eternal Realm came here, and when they saw the miserable appearance of this area, they sighed one by one.

This is the battle of the Eternal Realm!

This is still not many Eternal Realms involved, and the time of fighting is too short, if it continues, the Eternal Realm is afraid that it will be fought in various places in the Source Sea.

Of course, at that time, the Alliance of Lords will definitely intervene to stop it.

But at that time, it was already too late, and Yuan Hai didn't know how many heavens and earths would be shattered, and how many cultivators would fall and die.

In particular, some Supreme Beings were even more furious, they learned that there was a chance to be born here once in 100,000 eternal years, and they fled as soon as possible, but the Eternal Heaven and Earth where they were located did not leave, so they were destroyed in the aftermath of the battle in the Eternal Realm.

Therefore, they are angry, but helpless.

Those are the Eternal Realm, they are like ants, what can they do?

"The forbidden land of the Sea of Silence is gone!"

Ye Tian muttered.

I have to say that the strength of the Eternal Realm is too terrifying, he can't help the Sea of Silence, but the battle of the Eternal Realm can destroy the Sea of Silence.

Compared to the strength of the Eternal Realm, he was still too weak now, and he couldn't even withstand the aftermath.

Wow!

Ye Tian left here and returned to the Dark Forbidden Realm.

This great opportunity once in a hundred thousand eternal years, those eternal realms actually didn't gain much, but he gained a lot.

Among all the Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realms, his harvest can definitely be ranked first.

Moreover, he has also obtained a lot of resources that can improve his strength.

Therefore, his strength can definitely be improved a lot, and his strength can definitely easily step into a higher level.

So next, he had to retreat for a while.

Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian stayed in the Void Source Hall and began to retreat and cultivate.

He took out the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass and directly refined it.

Bang!!!!

The terrifying energy frantically tempered his body, and the strength of his body continued to increase, and his cultivation continued to improve.

It's a pity that his Endless Eternal Body has already reached the Perfection Realm, so the Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass can't continue to improve his Endless Eternal Body.

Time passed slowly, and finally the energy of this Void Scale Golden Leaf Grass was exhausted.

"My strength has increased several times, I'm afraid I'm about to reach the level of the six-pole realm half-step eternal realm!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently, he continued to refine some resources.

Although he doesn't know many resources, he can still find out after careful investigation, and after knowing the use, he can use these resources to improve his strength.

Gradually, Ye Tian's strength reached the level of the Six Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

This time, he was ready to hit the half-step Eternal Realm level of the Seven Extremes Realm before he was ready to get out.

And the resources he obtained this time were enough for him to reach the Seven Extremes Realm level, and even more than enough.

Of course, there are also some treasures that are not suitable for improving strength, and have other uses, and he is ready to keep them or give them to the Terran as a background.

Before you know it, another few years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian laughed wildly, extremely excited.

He had already successfully reached the Seven-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm level.

However, the remaining resources could not continue to improve his strength, because his cultivation had reached a limit, and it was difficult to continue to improve.

If you want to continue to improve your strength, only by continuing to comprehend the innate eternal rules can you hope to be promoted to the level of the eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm.

Otherwise, the Seven-Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm level would be his current limit.

For example, the six extreme realms of the Source Sea, the strongest is only the half-step eternal realm of the seven-pole realm, and it has never been able to break through to the level of the eight-pole realm.

In fact, their eternal body is not bad, not much gap from the legendary level eternal body, and they have also created a large number of eternal bodies, and their understanding of the innate eternal rules may be deeper than Ye Tian's, and their cultivation foundation has also reached an incredible level.

Maybe their foundation was not as good as Ye Tian at the beginning, but after reaching the extreme realm, there were many, many resources to make up for the foundation or strengthen the foundation.

Therefore, compared to these people, Ye Tian didn't have much advantage, if he didn't have other opportunities, it would be difficult for him to ascend to the level of the Eight Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian thought of a way to improve his strength, and that was to improve the world of will.

His current Will World was the second order, and if it was the third to third order, he might have the hope of reaching the Eight Extremes Realm and the Half-Step Eternal Realm level.

After cultivating for a few more tribulation years, Ye Tian's strength did not improve much, so he began to work hard to improve the strength of the human race.

With his help, the strength of the Terran Supreme improved rapidly, and Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue and others also obtained several treasures given by Ye Tian, reshaping the foundation, improving the potential, plus there were many resources to improve their cultivation, and their strength quickly increased to the top of the Sevenfold Supreme One.

At this rate, it would not be difficult for their cultivation to be promoted to the level of a supreme being.

If you want to ascend to the Half-Step Eternal Realm, you can take the Void True Liquid, or you can rely on your own efforts to impact the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

this day.

His wife Xiao Yue is out of the customs.

"Husband, I broke through!"

Xiao Yue appeared in front of Ye Tian and said excitedly.

Ye Tian looked over and saw that Xiao Yue's cultivation had reached the extreme of the half-step Eternal Realm, and his comprehension of the rules of eternity had also reached a very high level, and he might have created a lot of eternal techniques.

Therefore, Xiao Yue's strength was definitely at the top of the half-step Eternal Realm combat power, not weaker than a few of the twelve ancestors of the Source God Pavilion, and even stronger.

This is the effect of the Taichen Holy Flower, it is too against the sky!

With Xiao Yue's breakthrough, the Terran currently has two half-step Eternal Realms.

In the following years, Ye Tian relied on the strength of his Seven Extremes Realm and the half-step Eternal Realm to break into many treasures and plunder many resources one by one.

A lot of resources are useless to him, and he doesn't use them for himself, but for the sake of the Terrans.

Unconsciously, another long millions of eons have passed, which is equivalent to several eternal years.

Now.

The human race gave birth to a large number of supreme beings, and even Ye Xingchen and the others had reached the realm of the Ninefold Supreme One, among which Ye Yu directly used the Void True Liquid to ascend to the half-step eternal realm, and was not ready to rely on himself to break through.

At the same time, Ye Tian found a lot of resources that could help them refine their clones, so many high-level people of the Terran clan had clones.

But Ye Tian's own strength still hasn't improved much, but his will has improved a little, and he has opened up dozens of more will worlds, and the eternal technique has created some more, and the previous eternal technique has been perfected.

In addition, his perception of the rules of innate eternity is a little stronger.

But even so, he was still far from the Eight-Extremes Realm half-step Eternal Realm.

Therefore, Ye Tian was ready to decide to leave the source sea and go to the space-time territory to find an opportunity.

Of course, he only copied his body and went there, and his body remained in the Dark Forbidden Realm.
